summary: Iteration 39 - Phase 3A Features (Communications Hub, Yield Alerts, District Benchmarking) PASSED. All 47 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Yield Alerts panel with 3 tabs (Dashboard, Rules, History) and evaluation button working. District Benchmarking panel with 3 tabs (Enterprise Overview, Rankings, Heat Map) showing 7 properties. Integration toolbar buttons (Outlook, Teams, Gmail) present and clickable.
critical_code_review_comments: Communications Hub provides demo data for Outlook (7 emails), Gmail (5 emails), Teams (6 chats) - ready for real OAuth when configured
Yield Alerts supports 4 default rules with severity levels (critical, warning, info) and CRUD operations
Alert evaluation checks food_cost_pct, yield_variance_pct, revenue_at_risk, category_variance_pct against configurable thresholds
District Benchmarking shows 7 properties with metrics: revenue, food_cost_pct, gross_margin, daily_covers, satisfaction
Heatmap supports 6 metrics with color-coded visualization (green=good, red=poor)
All MongoDB collections properly queried with _id exclusion
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all tabs and content sections
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: properties (7), menu_items, alert_rules (4 default rules seeded on first access). Benchmark snapshot created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified Phase 3A features. Backend: /api/integrations/* (status, outlook/emails, outlook/calendar, outlook/send, gmail/emails, gmail/labels, teams/chats, teams/channels, teams/send), /api/alerts/* (rules CRUD, evaluate, history, acknowledge, resolve, summary), /api/benchmarking/* (sites, heatmap, snapshot, history). Frontend: Yield Alerts panel has data-testid='yield-alerts-panel' with tabs alerts-tab-dashboard, alerts-tab-rules, alerts-tab-history. District Benchmarking panel has data-testid='district-benchmarking-panel' with tabs bench-tab-overview, bench-tab-rankings, bench-tab-heatmap. Integration buttons in toolbar: button[title='Outlook Mail'], button[title='Microsoft Teams'], button[title='Gmail'].

district_benchmarking_panel.kpis_displayed: PASS - Properties: 7, Total Outlets: 74, Total Revenue: $3720K, Avg Margin: 41.7%, Avg Satisfaction: 4.2/5

integration_toolbar.teams_button: PASS - button[title='Microsoft Teams'] found and clickable
